topIngredients.name: Kale (Brassica Oleracea)
topIngredients.benefit: Rich in vitamins C and K for brightening and circulation

topIngredients.name: Green Tea (EGCG)
topIngredients.benefit: Potent antioxidant that fights environmental damage during cleansing

verdict: Youth To The People Superfood Cleanser is a premium gel cleanser with a genuinely impressive antioxidant profile. The pH-balanced formula removes makeup effectively without disrupting the skin microbiome.
